items.want_of_repair: Vinyl flooring is worn, lifting at edges and stained.
items.remedy: Remove existing vinyl flooring and replace with new to match existing.

items.want_of_repair: Walls are soiled and due for redecoration.
items.remedy: Clean down and redecorate walls with 2 coats of emulsion paint.

items.want_of_repair: Kitchen units are damaged, doors hanging off hinges.
items.remedy: Repair all kitchen units, replace damaged doors and rehang. Leave in good working order.

items.want_of_repair: Pointing to brickwork has deteriorated and is missing in areas.
items.remedy: Rake out loose and missing pointing and repoint with mortar to match existing.

items.want_of_repair: Cast iron downpipe is corroded and leaking at joints.
items.remedy: Clean down, repair joints and redecorate with rust inhibitor, undercoat and gloss.
